commands: vite-plus run build 2>&1 # initial run, create the cache
vite-plus run build 2>&1 # should hit the cache
vite-plus run build 2>&1 # should hit the cache and make sure the replay order is chronological
vite-plus run build 2>&1 # should hit the cache and make sure the replay order is chronological again
vite-plus run build 2>&1 # should hit the cache and make sure the replay order is chronological again
